title: Formula in Dashboard
excerpt:
Hello everyone. 
I need to enter a formula in the dashboard. 
The formula would be very simple: 
Value (example “30.000 USD”) - Sum of a column of the Board. 
I see that through the widget ‘Number’ the sum can be display…

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone.
I need to enter a formula in the dashboard.

The formula would be very simple:
Value (example “30.000 USD”) - Sum of a column of the Board.

I see that through the widget ‘Number’ the sum can be displayed, but I would need to display the value you get by subtracting that figure from a number I entered.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AleRun

Right now this is one thing the formula column doesn’t support. You can’t use the sum of a column in a formula — I think this is what you’re asking for?

Let me know if I misunderstood!

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this something that would be possible in the future? It would be supper usefull.

posts.author: jimwelch (Jim Welch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im curious how others are getting around the lack of neither dashboards or boards supporting performing formulas on column sums.

I for example want to track my tax liability based upon gross income (sum of one group) minus year to date expenses (sum of another group) times percentage of liability (15%).

Another use case example would be taking the sum of monthly expenses (a sum of a group) and putting it in a formula to determine days left of runway.

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any update on this possible feature?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AleRun @Sotiris @jimwelch

While we wait for monday to implement that, as a workaround I would like to mention that the Reports by Screenful add-on can do calculations based on sums of columns (disclosure: I’m the founder). You can learn more about this feature from this blog post.

Release+2021-02+Banner1500×560 153 KB

You can find this add-on at the monday.com marketplace: https://monday.com/marketplace/19

posts.author: BeaCruz (Beatriz Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any news about use formula colunms in Dashboards?
@julia-monday.com
